final:
module top_module (
        input a,
        input b,
        input c,
        input d,
        output reg g);assign g = ( ~a & ~b & ~c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & ~b & c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & b & ~c & ~d ) |
           ( ~a & b & c & ~d ) |
           ( a & ~b & ~c & d ) |
           ( a & ~b & c & d ) |
           ( a & b & ~c & d ) |
           ( a & b & c & d ) ;

endmodule
